title: KRATOM
description: Kratom (Mitragyna speciosa) is a tropical tree from Southeast Asia whose leaves contain alkaloids with opioid-like and stimulant properties. Effects vary by dose and strain - lower doses are stimulating while higher doses produce sedation and pain relief. ⚠️ WARNING: Highly addictive with significant dependence potential.

research.title: The pharmacology and toxicology of kratom: from traditional herb to drug of abuse
research.summary: Examines kratom's global rise as a recreational drug despite safety concerns including hospital visits and deaths linked to extracts. Discusses stimulant and sedative effects.

research.title: Kratom use disorder: a primer for primary care physicians
research.summary: Reviews kratom prevalence in the US and its opioid-like effects. Provides guidance for physicians recognizing kratom use disorder.

research.title: Kratom's Emergence and Persistence Within the US Polydrug Epidemic
research.summary: Analyzes self-reported kratom use as opioid substitute and substance use disorder management. Highlights gaps in controlled human studies.

research.title: Kratom use and mental health: A systematic literature review and case example
research.summary: Systematic review finding kratom may worsen psychotic and manic symptoms in those with preexisting psychiatric conditions.

research.title: The Potential for Kratom as an Antidepressant and Antipsychotic
research.summary: Investigates kratom compounds acting on opioid and antipsychotic receptors. Survey data suggest users experience depression and anxiety relief.

research.title: Beneficial and adverse health effects of kratom (Mitragyna speciosa): A critical review
research.summary: Reviews kratom's stimulant, analgesic, and opioid-like properties alongside risks of tolerance and addiction.

sentiment.summary: Users report significant benefits for pain, mood, and energy, but dependency potential exists. Highly individual responses; strain and dose significantly impact effects.

effects.label: Strain Variation:
effects.description: Red, green, and white veins have different profiles.

effects.label: Tolerance Development:
effects.description: Regular use leads to tolerance and dependence.

dosage.label: Start Low:
dosage.description: Begin with 1-2 grams to assess response.

sideEffects.label: Dependence Risk:
sideEffects.description: Physical dependence possible with regular use.

sideEffects.label: Legal Status:
sideEffects.description: Varies by jurisdiction; banned in some areas.

availability.label: Legal in Most US States:
availability.description: But banned in some states and countries.
